title: RP Duties the MHRA Inspects
alt: Checklist of Responsible Person duties the MHRA inspects under UK GDP

items.label: Quality system ownership
items.desc: Drive a QMS aligned with ICH Q10, not just endorse it

items.label: Training & competence
items.desc: Initial and continued training with records that survive scrutiny

items.label: Self-inspection & CAPA
items.desc: Live programme with root-cause analysis and tracked actions

items.label: Complaints, returns, recalls
items.desc: Authority to coordinate a prompt, effective recall

items.label: Supplier & customer checks
items.desc: Buy from authorised suppliers, supply authorised recipients

items.label: Change & deviation control
items.desc: Risk-assess changes before they take effect
